chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It is very important to learn the concept of inline and block elements in HTML

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Inline elements are those which take only the required width

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: and block elements are those which take the entire width of the screen

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This is also called display property which can be set through CSS

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If you are enjoying this video then please like this video

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So let's go to the computer screen and see inline and block elements closely

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Through some very good examples

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Let's roll the intro

chunks.text: If you haven't accessed the playlist and code then you can access both

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But I will tell you guys in detail about inline elements and why I want to use them

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So inline elements are those which take only the required width

chunks.text: No, they say that we need the full width

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And our anchor tag is the inline element

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Inline elements only take the same place as they want

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Block elements take the full width

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And the next content that comes is below them

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: When we take the full width, the next content will come below them

chunks.text: Along with that, if I talk about div

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So he took only the width as much as it is necessary

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So it will not come here

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So it takes the same width as it is necessary

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can change

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And if you have set the display property

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Inline Block Elements in HTML Sigma Web Development
